Nvidia To Ramp Up Production Of Liquid-Cooled Blackwell GPUs, Redefining AI Data Centers
data.description: Nvidia's Blackwell GPUs are driving demand for liquid cooling in AI servers, creating opportunities for companies like Vertiv and Delta. Customization is key in this changing supply chain.
